content: Validation view-scoping slice completed: Prototype-only diagnostics such as screen_node_without_image, transition_without_trigger, unreachable_screen, ambiguous_transition, hotspot_out_of_bounds, scenario_unknown_start, and scenario_unknown_step remain in the canonical model but are suppressed from Overview/Layer/3D validation overlay and diagnostics-panel display unless the requested base view is prototype. Global diagnostics such as external_transition_without_boundary and image_url_disallowed remain visible. Updated docs/aof/VALIDATION-VIEW-SCOPING-QIF-CHECK-2026-07-12.md. Verification: npm test -- --run test/render.test.ts (57 passing); npx tsc --noEmit; npm test (236 passing); npm run build; in-app browser smoke on http://127.0.0.1:5173/ sample release-checkout with Overview + validation found no screen_node_without_image or Prototype fallback-card message in page text. Existing untracked reports/ remains untouched.
